_comment: Eval CI quality-gate baselines (ADR-0106, epic #983 slice 4). Per-suite minimum aggregate_score the backend eval runner (POST /api/agent/eval/run) must hold. A suite falling below (baseline - tolerance) fails the gate. Raise a baseline only with a green run on the new bar; never lower it to make a red gate pass. Suites match the seeded golden-set modules (0155 + 0172 'technician' + 0225 the 26-agent org recast, #1538). The gate's default selection is every baselined suite; narrow it per run with the EVAL_SUITES env var. 0.75 is the guardrail-suite bar (per 0172). Gate stays dormant until AGENT_EVAL_BASE_URL is set.
